payload.description:
Purpose: integrate the dashboard web app with Gravatar so authenticated users see their Gravatar in the left sidebar and understand where to update it from user settings.

Intent: As a dashboard user, I want my account avatar to be sourced from Gravatar, so that my profile image is consistent with the email identity I use across services.

Definition of Done:
- Sidebar user identity area renders the user's Gravatar image when an email is available.
- User settings show the current avatar context and a clear link to update the image at Gravatar.
- Behavior is covered by executable frontend specs before production implementation.
- Dashboard quality gates pass before closure.
payload.title: Dashboard Gravatar user avatars
